description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Written in a rudimentary hand (Goitein calls it a "most miserable script"). Location: Cairo. Dated: Av 1[3]82 Seleucid, which is 1071 CE. Groom: Yaʿaqov b. Yeshuʿa. Bride: Dawra (? דורה) bt. Yiṣḥaq. Marriage payments: 1 + 2 = 3. No dowry. The payment 12.5 is also mentioned, indicating that this is not her first marriage. (Information from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: כתובה בכתב ידיים ראשוני; מיקום: קהיר; מתוארכת: אב 1382 שטרות = 1071 לספירה; החתן: יעקב בן ישועה; הכלה: דורה(?) בת יצחק; תשלומים: 1+2=3
